name: P90 | 碧绿升藤
descriptionEn: Easily recognizable for its unique bullpup design, the P90 is a great weapon to shoot on the move due to its high-capacity magazine and low recoil. It has been spray-painted with a flower pattern in various shades of green. Some see a nuisance; I see beauty
descriptionZh: 因其独特的无托设计而更加容易辨认，多亏了 P90 高容量的弹匣和低后坐力，这把武器非常适合边移动边射击。 这把武器采用各种色调的花朵图案进行喷涂。 有人觉得是破事儿，在我看来是好事儿
